# Project Roadmap

## Completion Horizon

Based on [N]-sprint rolling average of [X.X] stories/sprint:

| Milestone | Remaining Stories | Est. Sprints | Est. Date Range | Confidence |
|-----------|------------------|-------------|----------------|------------|
| [active-milestone] | N | ~N | [range] | low/medium/high |
| production-complete | N | ~N | [range] | low/medium/high |
| release | N | ~N | [range] | low/medium/high |

Confidence: **low** = high velocity variance (>40% spread); **medium** = moderate spread; **high** = consistent last 3+ sprints.

## Milestone Definitions Summary

| Milestone | Player/Stakeholder Promise | Quality Bar | Status |
|-----------|--------------------------|-------------|--------|
| prototype | "Does this mechanic feel fun?" | Throwaway | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
| vertical-slice | "Does the full loop work?" | Loop-complete | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
| demo | "Is this worth wishlisting?" | Scoped high quality | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
| alpha | "Is the game feature-complete?" | All features present | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
| beta | "Is this almost shippable?" | Bug fixes + polish only | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
| release | "Ship it." | Gold master | [PAST/ACTIVE/FUTURE] |
